subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come with the truth is verily the Hidden Command and the Treasured Secret, through Whom was established [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی بالحق انه هو الامر المکنون و السر المخزون به نصبت
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
